en: Pick a topic. Stock option backdating.
ko: Mike 정말 아름다운 서약이었어 특히 가족 부분 고마워 Harvey

en: Although backdating options is legal, violations arise related to disclosures
ko: 말하기 전에 와줘서 정말 기뻐 나도 하지만

en: under IRC section 409A.
You forgot about Sarbanes-Oxley.
ko: 회사를 구했잖아 Harvey 뭔가 말하기 전에 내가 틀렸어 넌 시니어 파트너

en: Statute of limitations renders Sarbanes-Oxley moot post 2007.
ko: 감이야 준비가 됐어 신혼여행에서 돌아오면 안 돌아올 거야 Harvey

en: Well, not if you can find actions to cover up the violation as established in the Sixth Circuit May 2008.
ko: Rachel이랑 시애틀에서 로펌을 운영할 기회를 받았어

en: It's impressive, but you're sitting at a computer.
ko: 포춘 500대 기업 상대 집단 소송만 하는 곳이야

en: Playing hearts. Sorry. If you want to beat me, you're gonna have to do it at something else.
ko: Mike Harvey Donna가 와서 회사가 곤란하다고 했을 때 말한 대로 했지만

en: How can you know all that? I told you, I like to read.
ko: 다시는 그런 선택을 하고 싶지 않아 안 해도 돼 프로보노 사건을 더 하고 싶으면 그게 요점이 아니야 Harvey

en: And once I read something, I understand it.
And once I understand it, I never forget it.
I beat you fair and square. No, you didn't.
You're right. I cheated. Like you.
You jumped to the other side. You put me on the other side.
I had a deal that put your name right next to mine.
And it wasn't even up there yet, and you started acting like it was on top of my...
To protect you. Bullshit. This wasn't about protecting me. This was about advancing you.
That's what this whole thing is about. What? Hartman said it. I didn't think it was true.
He said, you don't trust me. He meant, you're afraid of me.
Afraid of you? Boy, I just kicked your ass.
And you didn't just want it. You begged me for it.
So now, you're going to stay here, be humble,
and learn your goddamn place. Harvey, I am sorry, all right?
But I need you to listen to me now. Listen to you?
You know when I would have listened to you? That night. Jessica threatened me.
I don't care. Anyone comes at you with any threat at all, you come to me.
I don't give a shit if it's the Queen of England. You come to me. You tell me.
You tell me everything. That's what goddamn loyalty is.
I'm sorry. You're sorry?
You've been lying to me since the day Mike Ross arrived.
I knew Harvey and Jessica never really accepted me, but I thought you were different.
I thought you were my friend. I am your friend, Lewis.
No, you're not. And don't you ever say that to me again.
Where are you going? To see your friend, Jessica.
Lewis knows.
